subtitle: Marie absent all week; James returning 18 June; DSE data imports live; volunteer reporting awaits comments
context: Marie Cooksey is on leave 8-12 June and requires approval on multiple pending items including DTP1092 College Staff in PeopleXD comments and volunteer reporting queries. James Salas Guillen is absent until Thursday 18 June, returning post-handover; his H&S support queue and DSE user data imports to Cardinus are covered by Chris Sanders but require your sign-off on contractor manual record creation and blocking of user archiving in Healthy Working Plus. The automated PeopleXD to Cardinus data upload went live 3 June and the PeopleXD to DSE system (Healthy Working Plus) interface is now functioning; however, a Cority Employee Import Log error occurred on 5 June requiring review. Michael O'Sullivan has returned from leave and replied to your volunteer reporting question with additional context requiring your response. The Strategic H&S Modular System evaluation criteria weightings are due for review this week, and OWL network maintenance is scheduled for 11 June. Open first: Michael O'Sullivan's volunteer reporting reply with attachments.
